description: Generate text-to-video with HappyHorse 1.0 on RunComfy. Documents HappyHorse 1.0's strengths (#1 on Artificial Analysis Video Arena, native 1080p with in-pass synchronized audio, multi-shot character consistency, 6-language prompt support), the duration / aspect-ratio / resolution schema, and when to route to Wan 2.7 / Seedance 2 / LTX 2 instead. Calls `runcomfy run happyhorse/happyhorse-1-0/text-to-video` through the local RunComfy CLI. Triggers on "happyhorse", "happy horse", "happyhorse 1.0", "happyhorse video", or any explicit ask to generate video with this model.
representativeQueries: Generate a multi-shot video with HappyHorse 1.0
Create a video with character consistency and synchronized audio
Make a text-to-video with HappyHorse on RunComfy
Generate a cinematic video with HappyHorse 1.0
Create a story video with consistent character appearance
